title: Fig. 3 in Molecular assessment of Gymnotus spp. (Gymnotiformes: Gymnotidae) fishing used as live baitfish in the Tietê River, Brazil
author: Faria-Pereira, Lilian Paula
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Agarose gel electrophoresis (3.0%) of NlaIII restriction fragments obtained from COI partial PCR amplification. Gymnotus cf. sylvius (1T13, 1T24, 1T20, 1T36, 2T29) and G. cf. cuia (2T13, 2T32 and 2T24). M- 100 bp molecular weight marker (Sinapse Inc). Numbers at fragments indicate estimated molecular weight.
steps_raw: Fig. 3. Agarose gel electrophoresis (3.0%) of NlaIII restriction fragments obtained from COI partial PCR amplification. Gymnotus cf. sylvius (1T13, 1T24, 1T20, 1T36, 2T29) and G. cf. cuia (2T13, 2T32 and 2T24). M- 100 bp molecular weight marker (Sinapse Inc). Numbers at fragments indicate estimated molecular weight.
